title: Curse of the Black Stone

startPoint.en: Talk to Bryll Thoksdottir at Daemonheim.
startPoint.es: Habla con Bryll Thoksdottir en Daemonheim.

children.title: Access to the Ancient Cavern from Barbarian Training

items.name: Black Knights' Fortress
items.display: Any set of equipment that allows access to the Black Knights' Fortress

children.name: Bronze med helm
children.display: Bronze med helm and iron chainbody

children.name: Black full helm
children.display: Black full helm, black platebody and black platelegs (all variants work, including trimmed, gold-trimmed, heraldic and bugged)

children.name: Elite black helm
children.display: Elite black helm, elite black platebody and elite black platelegs

children.name: Dagon'hai hat
children.display: Dagon'hai hat, Dagon'hai robe top and Dagon'hai robe bottom

children.name: Black Knight captain's helm
children.display: Black Knight captain's helm, Black Knight captain's cuirass and Black Knight captain's gown (the override version works)

children.name: Black Knight's Fortress
children.display: Cosmetic overrides will prevent access to the Black Knight's Fortress

items.name: Pat of butter
items.display: Pat of butter (optional, not needed if picking or breaking the locks on Tessa's manacles)

recommended.name: Ring of kinship
recommended.display: Ring of kinship for teleporting to Daemonheim

recommended.name: Arc journal
recommended.display: Arc journal for teleporting to the Arc

recommended.name: 'Chipped' Varrock teleport
recommended.display: 'Chipped' Varrock teleport for teleporting to the Varrock Museum

recommended.name: Traveller's necklace
recommended.display: Traveller's necklace or wicked hood for teleporting to Wizard's Tower

recommended.name: Adamant dragon dungeon
recommended.display: Means of teleportation to reach Adamant dragon dungeon, e.g. Dungeoneering cape or metallic dragon trinkets

recommended.name: The Heart teleport
recommended.display: The Heart teleport or Desert amulet 2, 3, or 4

recommended.name: Aminishi teleport
recommended.display: Aminishi teleport for quick access to the Temple of Aminishi

recommended.name: Dragonkin Laboratory teleport
recommended.display: Dragonkin Laboratory teleport for quick access to the Dragonkin Laboratory

recommended.name: Shadow Reef teleport
recommended.display: Shadow Reef teleport for quick access to The Shadow Reef

recommended.name: Wilderness sword
recommended.display: Wilderness sword for quick access to Edgeville

recommended.name: Mask of the Yellow Wyrm
recommended.display: Mask of the Yellow Wyrm or quick teleport to Kharid-et Dig Site for quick teleport to the Citharede Abbey

recommended.name: Archaeology teleport
recommended.display: 2 Archaeology teleports for quick access to the Black Knight's Base

kills: Enemies within the Temple of Aminishi (if not already done at least once before)
Enemies within the Dragonkin Laboratory (if not already done at least once before)
Enemies within the Shadow Reef (if not already done at least once before)
6 Crassian warriors and 6 Crassian scouts (both level 75)

rewards.name: Temple of Aminishi
rewards.display: 10% reduction of damage received in the Temple of Aminishi elite dungeon.

rewards.name: Dragonkin Laboratory
rewards.display: 10% reduction of damage received in the Dragonkin Laboratory elite dungeon.

rewards.name: The Shadow Reef
rewards.display: 10% reduction of damage received in the Shadow Reef elite dungeon.

rewards.name: Dungeoneering token
rewards.display: Players can now purchase an upgrade to the Elite Dungeon chests for 750,000 Dungeoneering tokens, which allows banking within the dungeon and always has a 20% chance to double a boss drop.

rewards.name: Contemplation
rewards.display: Contemplation (in Kerapac's laboratory, if not already unlocked during One of a Kind)

rewards.name: Kethsi (music track)
rewards.display: Kethsi (upon entering the plane of Kethsi, can be unlocked before even starting the quest or during Ritual of the Mahjarrat)

text.en: Use the ring of kinship to quickly teleport to Daemonheim. You can get one for free as you'll need to visit Daemonheim many times during the quest.
text.es: Usa el ring of kinship para teletransportarte rápidamente a Daemonheim. Puedes conseguir uno gratis, ya que tendrás que visitar Daemonheim muchas veces durante la misión.

text.en: Talk to Bryll Thoksdottir beside Marmaros the rewards trader in Daemonheim.
text.es: Habla con Bryll Thoksdottir junto a Marmaros the rewards trader en Daemonheim.

text.en: Combat gear and a backpack space
Travel to Waiko via Quartermaster Gully in the northern part of Port Sarim.
text.es: Viaja a Waiko a través de Quartermaster Gully en la parte norte de Port Sarim.

text.en: Talk to Zhuka (bamboo merchant) at the southern part of the marketplace.
text.es: Habla con Zhuka (bamboo merchant) en la parte sur del mercado.

text.en: Travel to Whale's Maw by talking to Quartermaster Gully (via travel option and select Whale's Maw).
text.es: Viaja a Whale's Maw hablando con Quartermaster Gully (mediante la opción de viaje y selecciona Whale's Maw).

text.en: Talk to Sea Witch Kaula at the northwestern part of the island.
text.es: Habla con Sea Witch Kaula en la parte noroeste de la isla.

text.en: Dig the lump of sand near the western-most ship.
text.es: Cava el montón de arena cerca del barco más al oeste.

text.en: Check the tortle to the south to obtain a note from the Jade Spider.
text.es: Revisa la tortle al sur para obtener una nota de la Jade Spider.

text.en: Travel to Tuai Leit via Quartermaster Gully.
text.es: Viaja a Tuai Leit a través de Quartermaster Gully.

text.en: Speak to Sensei Seaworth , who is south-west at the market.
text.es: Habla con Sensei Seaworth, que se encuentra al suroeste del mercado.

text.en: Travel to Goshima via Quartermaster Gully.
text.es: Viaja a Goshima a través de Quartermaster Gully.

text.en: Kill all 12 crassians on the island.
text.es: Mata a los 12 crassians de la isla.

text.en: Open and go through the Gate of Goshima and talk to Madame Shih (the Jade Spider) in the easternmost building.
text.es: Abre y atraviesa el Gate of Goshima y habla con Madame Shih (la Jade Spider) en el edificio más al este.

text.en: If you've already completed Temple of Aminishi at least once, you may skip the battle.
text.es: Si ya has completado Temple of Aminishi al menos una vez, puedes saltarte el combate.

text.en: Otherwise complete the Temple of Aminishi and defeat Seiryu the Azure Serpent before returning back to Madame Shih.
text.es: De lo contrario, completa Temple of Aminishi y derrota a Seiryu the Azure Serpent antes de volver con Madame Shih.

text.en: Uncut dragonstone, rope
'Chipped' Varrock teleport or Dave's spellbook, ring of kinship, dragon trinkets, or Dungeoneering cape

images.caption: The door that leads to Mr Mordaut Tribute, right behind the first flight of stairs

images.filename: Curse of the Black Stone Fireplace.png
images.caption: The location of the unlit fireplace at Daemonheim, near the path towards the boat

text.en: Talk to Mr Mordaut in his office in the basement of Varrock Museum that is accessed behind the stairs.
text.es: Habla con Mr Mordaut en su oficina en el sótano de Varrock Museum, a la que se accede detrás de las escaleras.

text.en: Use a 'chipped' Varrock teleport, Dave's spellbook, the Varrock lodestone or Fort Forinthry lodestone to get to the museum quickly.
text.es: Usa un teletransporte a Varrock "astillado", el libro de hechizos de Dave, la piedra de viaje de Varrock o la piedra de viaje de Fort Forinthry para llegar rápidamente al museo.

text.en: Go to Daemonheim and investigate the fireplace to the east of the fountain to find a carved dragonstone (left).
text.es: Ve a Daemonheim e investiga la chimenea al este de la fuente para encontrar una dragonstone tallada (izquierda).

text.en: Cut your uncut dragonstone to create the carved dragonstone (right).
text.es: Talla tu dragonstone sin tallar para crear la dragonstone tallada (derecha).

text.en: Use either the left or right carved dragonstone on the fountain.
text.es: Usa la dragonstone tallada izquierda o derecha en la fuente.

chatOptions: 1 Place the stone in the eye socket.

text.en: Enter the crumbling watchtower to the west.
text.es: Entra en la crumbling watchtower al oeste.

text.en: Talk to Hannibus in the west room.
text.es: Habla con Hannibus en la habitación oeste.

text.en: Head to the room with the entrance to the adamant dragon dungeon in the Brimhaven Dungeon between the fire giants and black demons, and north of the iron and steel dragons.
text.es: Dirígete a la sala con la entrada al adamant dragon dungeon en el Brimhaven Dungeon, entre los fire giants y los black demons, y al norte de los iron y steel dragons.

text.en: Either via the dungeon entrance just west of the Karamja lodestone and navigating to the room
text.es: Ya sea a través de la entrada de la mazmorra justo al oeste de la piedra de viaje de Karamja y navegando hasta la sala

text.en: via a metallic dragon trinkets' teleport option
text.es: mediante la opción de teletransporte de los trinkets de dragón metálico

text.en: via the Dungeoneering cape teleport and heading north-west
text.es: mediante el teletransporte de la capa de Dungeoneering y dirigiéndote al noroeste

text.en: with the Kethsi ring.
text.es: con el Kethsi ring.

text.en: If you used a Kethsi ring or metallic trinket to teleport directly into the dungeon, first go out by ascending the stairs.
text.es: Si usaste un Kethsi ring o un trinket metálico para teletransportarte directamente a la mazmorra, primero sal subiendo las escaleras.

text.en: Enter the adamant dragon dungeon and investigate the mithril smelter on the easternmost wall of the easternmost room to obtain a metallic object.
text.es: Entra en el adamant dragon dungeon e investiga el mithril smelter en la pared más al este de la sala más al este para obtener un objeto metálico.

text.en: If you have Eek with you, you may investigate the adamant smelter for some extra dialogue.
text.es: Si tienes a Eek contigo, puedes investigar el adamant smelter para obtener algo de diálogo extra.

text.en: Talk to the adamant dragon in the south-western room to heat the metallic object.
text.es: Habla con el adamant dragon en la sala del suroeste para calentar el objeto metálico.

chatOptions: 3 Your baby is cold, warm her up.

text.en: With a rope in the backpack, investigate one of the pits north of the entrance.
text.es: Con una cuerda en la mochila, investiga uno de los pozos al norte de la entrada.

chatOptions: 2 Attach a rope and drop the heated metal into the pit.

text.en: Investigate the dragon head near the stairs.
text.es: Investiga la cabeza de dragón cerca de las escaleras.

chatOptions: 1 Smash the tablet on the teeth.

text.en: Combat gear
Ring of kinship, Goshima teleport
Head back to Kerapac's Lab by entering the crumbling watchtower in Daemonheim.
text.es: Regresa al Kerapac's Lab entrando en la crumbling watchtower en Daemonheim.

text.en: Investigate the effigy shelves in the room with Hannibus.
text.es: Investiga las estanterías de efigies en la sala con Hannibus.

text.en: Referencing the image to the right, activate the following dragonkin statues in any order: 1, 3, 5
text.es: Consultando la imagen a la derecha, activa las siguientes estatuas de dragonkin en cualquier orden: 1, 3, 5

text.en: Enter the portal in the northern room.
text.es: Entra en el portal de la sala norte.

text.en: Talk to Kerapac.
text.es: Habla con Kerapac.

text.en: Talk to Bryll Thoksdottir back in Daemonheim.
text.es: Habla con Bryll Thoksdottir de vuelta en Daemonheim.

text.en: If you have already completed Dragonkin Laboratory at least once, you may skip the battle.
text.es: Si ya has completado Dragonkin Laboratory al menos una vez, puedes saltarte el combate.

text.en: Otherwise complete the Dragonkin Laboratory and defeat the Black Stone Dragon before returning back to Bryll Thosdottir.
text.es: De lo contrario, completa Dragonkin Laboratory y derrota al Black Stone Dragon antes de volver con Bryll Thosdottir.

text.en: Travel back to Goshima. (A cutscene will start)
text.es: Viaja de vuelta a Goshima. (Se iniciará una escena)

text.en: Head back to Daemonheim and talk to Bryll Thoksdottir.
text.es: Regresa a Daemonheim y habla con Bryll Thoksdottir.

text.en: Law rune, raw fish, and two backpack spaces
Traveller's necklace or wicked hood, Mask of the Yellow Wyrm, ring of kinship
Speak to Wizard Myrtle near the Wizards' Tower.
text.es: Habla con Wizard Myrtle cerca de la Wizards' Tower.

chatOptions: 4 Can you help me get the fish now?

text.en: Use the traveller's necklace or wicked hood to navigate to the Wizards' Tower, or use the fairy ring DIS to teleport, or run to it from the Draynor lodestone.
text.es: Usa el traveller's necklace o la wicked hood para llegar a la Wizards' Tower, o usa el fairy ring DIS para teletransportarte, o corre hasta allí desde la piedra de viaje de Draynor.

text.en: Give Wizard Myrtle any raw fish and a law rune to obtain small raw sillago.
text.es: Dale a Wizard Myrtle cualquier pescado crudo y una law rune para obtener small raw sillago.

text.en: Fill the empty enchanted "vacuum" vial on the Ice Mountain near Edgeville.
text.es: Llena el vacuum vial encantado vacío en Ice Mountain, cerca de Edgeville.

text.en: Dry the wet seaweed while standing near the huge fountain at Abbey of St. Elspeth Citharede.
text.es: Seca las algas mojadas mientras estás cerca de la gran fuente en Abbey of St. Elspeth Citharede.

text.en: Combine the potion of waterbreathing and drink it.
text.es: Combina la potion of waterbreathing y bébetela.

text.en: Return to Daemonheim and speak with Hannibus next to the heroes of the Shadow Reef and the Fremennik ship (Shadow reef) on the east coast.
text.es: Regresa a Daemonheim y habla con Hannibus junto a los heroes of the Shadow Reef y el barco Fremennik (Shadow reef) en la costa este.

text.en: If he is not there, instead talk to Bryll Thoksdottir.
text.es: Si no está allí, habla en su lugar con Bryll Thoksdottir.

text.en: 'Chipped' Varrock teleport; Desert amulet 2,3,or 4 or the Heart teleport; ring of kinship
Travel to the Edgeville lodestone to activate the artefact northwest.
text.es: Viaja a la piedra de viaje de Edgeville para activar el artefacto al noroeste.

text.en: Talk to Mr Mordaut at the Varrock Museum.
text.es: Habla con Mr Mordaut en Varrock Museum.

text.en: Travel to the Heart of Gielinor to meet with Vindicta.
text.es: Viaja a Heart of Gielinor para reunirte con Vindicta.

text.en: You may need to leave the dungeon via the lift, and re-enter for the chat option to appear.
text.es: Puede que necesites salir de la mazmorra mediante el ascensor y volver a entrar para que aparezca la opción de diálogo.

text.en: Talk to Bryll Thoksdottir near the ring of kinship's teleport location and then Quartermaster Gully near the Heroes of the Shadow Reef (you may talk to him at Port Sarim).
text.es: Habla con Bryll Thoksdottir cerca del lugar de teletransporte del ring of kinship y luego con Quartermaster Gully cerca de los Heroes of the Shadow Reef (puedes hablar con él en Port Sarim).

text.en: Arc journal or Waiko teleport

steps.filename: Curse of the Black Stone Steven.png
steps.caption: The location of Steven the seagull at Waiko

text.en: Travel to Waiko and speak to Steven's wife the seagull in the north-east (top of northernmost rock pillar)
text.es: Viaja a Waiko y habla con la gaviota, la esposa de Steven, al noreste (en lo alto del pilar de roca más al norte)

text.en: Speak to the 6 seagulls (locations on the map) to find evidence.
text.es: Habla con las 6 gaviotas (ubicaciones en el mapa) para encontrar pruebas.

text.en: On a water barrel near the Khan's house, on the eastern part of the island
text.es: En un barril de agua cerca de la casa del Khan, en la parte este de la isla

text.en: In the village, on a water barrel east of the southern pier
text.es: En el pueblo, en un barril de agua al este del muelle sur

text.en: On the southern pier, on a water barrel
text.es: En el muelle sur, en un barril de agua

text.en: On a crate in the shipwreck, near the western pier
text.es: En una caja del barco naufragado, cerca del muelle oeste

text.en: On a crate on the western pier
text.es: En una caja en el muelle oeste

text.en: Inside of a cage on the northern pier
text.es: Dentro de una jaula en el muelle norte

text.en: Go back to Steven's wife and speak to her.
text.es: Regresa con la esposa de Steven y habla con ella.

text.en: Disguise to enter the Black Knights' Fortress; combat gear
Dragon trinkets or Dungeoneering cape; ring of charos (a); ring of kinship; master archaeologist's outfit
Talk to Quartermaster Gully at the war table, east of Daemonheim.
text.es: Habla con Quartermaster Gully en la mesa de guerra, al este de Daemonheim.

text.en: Talk to Bryll Thoksdottir.
text.es: Habla con Bryll Thoksdottir.

text.en: Talk to Bosun Higgs.
text.es: Habla con Bosun Higgs.

text.en: Talk to Lieutenant Crane next to the map table in the Black Knights' Base in the very south of Taverley Dungeon
text.es: Habla con Lieutenant Crane junto a la mesa del mapa en la Black Knights' Base, en el extremo sur del Taverley Dungeon

text.en: Teleport via an Archaeology teleport or the master outfit and heading south.
text.es: Teletranspórtate mediante un teletransporte de Arqueología o el atuendo de maestro y dirígete al sur.

text.en: Via the Dungeoneering cape and heading east through the gate, then south.
text.es: Mediante la capa de Dungeoneering y dirigiéndote al este a través de la verja, luego al sur.

text.en: Run north-west of the Edgeville lodestone to reach the Black Knights' Fortress.
text.es: Corre al noroeste de la piedra de viaje de Edgeville para llegar a la Black Knights' Fortress.

text.en: Talk to the fortress guard at the entrance of the fortress while wearing the disguise.
text.es: Habla con el guardia de la fortaleza en la entrada mientras llevas el disfraz.

text.en: Interact with Tessa's suit of armour in the western barracks room.
text.es: Interactúa con la armadura de Tessa en la sala de los barracones del oeste.

text.en: Head to the north west corner and head up the stairs.
text.es: Dirígete a la esquina noroeste y sube las escaleras.

text.en: Talk to the slave standing along the north wall on the 2nd floor of the Black Knights' Fortress.
text.es: Habla con el esclavo que está junto a la pared norte en la 2ª planta del Black Knights' Fortress.

text.en: Talk to Lieutenant Crane about Tessa:
text.es: Habla con Lieutenant Crane sobre Tessa:

text.en: If wearing a ring of charos (a) lie to skip the steps to free Tessa.
text.es: Si llevas puesto un ring of charos (a), miente para saltarte los pasos para liberar a Tessa.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I just want to kill the ambassador.

text.en: Otherwise and proceed with these steps:
text.es: De lo contrario, sigue estos pasos:

text.en: Return to the fortress and interact with Tessa's suit of armour.
text.es: Regresa a la fortaleza e interactúa con la armadura de Tessa.

text.en: Head upstairs to smuggle out Tessa.
text.es: Sube las escaleras para sacar a Tessa a escondidas.

text.en: Give her the suit of armour.
text.es: Dale la armadura.

text.en: Return to Lieutenant Crane.
text.es: Regresa con Lieutenant Crane.

text.en: Head back to Daemonheim and speak to Bosun Higgs at the war table.
text.es: Vuelve a Daemonheim y habla con Bosun Higgs en la mesa de guerra.

text.en: Talk to Commandant Bletchley in the Black Knights' Fortress on the 2nd floor. He is standing along the north wall.
text.es: Habla con Commandant Bletchley en el Black Knights' Fortress, en la 2ª planta. Está de pie junto a la pared norte.

text.en: Talk to Lieutenant Crane.
text.es: Habla con Lieutenant Crane.

text.en: Speak to Bryll Thoksdottir near the war table in east Daemonheim.
text.es: Habla con Bryll Thoksdottir cerca de la mesa de guerra en el este de Daemonheim.

text.en: If you have already completed the dungeon, skip the battle.
text.es: Si ya has completado la mazmorra, sáltate el combate.

text.en: Otherwise, choose any option for your speech.
text.es: De lo contrario, elige cualquier opción para tu diálogo.

text.en: Complete the Shadow Reef.
text.es: Completa el Shadow Reef.

text.en: If this is your first time completing the dungeon, travel back to Bryll Thoksdottir after defeating the Ambassador.
text.es: Si es la primera vez que completas la mazmorra, regresa con Bryll Thoksdottir tras derrotar al Ambassador.
